name: agent-task-manager-openclaw-github-install

secretPolicy.slack: Use DM/modal/private input for credentials. Never post tokens, passwords, or bearer sessions to public Slack channels.
secretPolicy.cli: Prefer gh auth login and cloudflared tunnel login over asking users to paste long-lived tokens.
secretPolicy.agentToken: Do not ask the user for TASK_MANAGER_API_TOKEN. ATM generates it and writes it to the OpenClaw workspace during plugin install.

approvalFlow.prompt: Install Agent Task Manager on this machine and connect it to this OpenClaw workspace?
Collect first admin email and password for ATM bootstrap.
Ask for OpenClaw workspace path only if detection is uncertain.

uninstallApprovalFlow.prompt: Remove the Agent Task Manager integration from this OpenClaw workspace?
Ask an ATM admin to approve login so the OpenClaw agent token can be revoked.
uninstallApprovalFlow.skipOnlyIf: ATM cannot be started and the user accepts file-only uninstall

preferred.reason: Revokes the saved OpenClaw agent token and removes local skill files.

effects: Revokes the OpenClaw agent API token in ATM
Removes legacy task-manager plugin files when present

fileOnlyFallback.useOnlyWhen: ATM cannot be started or the user accepts token revoke cannot be verified.
fileOnlyFallback.limitation: This cannot revoke a token stored in ATM's database.

removeAtmApp.warning: Deletes local ATM data, tasks, audit logs, and token database.

verification: Call POST $TASK_MANAGER_API_URL/api/agent/connect/test with x-agent-id and bearer token from task-manager.env.
Confirm OpenClaw routes Slack messages, interactions, scheduled outbox polling, and scheduled Slack collection to the task-manager skill.
uninstallVerification: Check <openclaw-workspace>/skills/shared/task-manager-client.ts no longer exists, unless another integration owns it.
Confirm agent token revoked when the ATM API uninstall path was used.
